businessSummary.oneLiner: Government and enterprise AI data analytics platform leader, powering Gotham (defense), Foundry (enterprise), and AIP (AI Platform)
businessSummary.description: Palantir provides data integration, analytics, and AI decision-making platforms for government and commercial organizations. FY2025 revenue $4.48B (+56% YoY), adjusted operating margin 32%. Friday close $150.95 (-1.66%). President Aki Jain speaking at NVIDIA GTC 2026 today. Joint sovereign AI OS launch with NVIDIA. AIPCon 9 unveiled partnerships with GE Aerospace, Polymarket, LG CNS.
howTheyMakeMoney: Government contracts (Gotham - defense, intelligence data analysis)
Enterprise AI platform (Foundry - industrial data analytics)
AIP Bootcamps (5-day intensive pilots converting to enterprise-wide deals)
keyProducts: Gotham - Mission-critical defense and intelligence analysis
Foundry - Enterprise data integration and analytics
Sovereign AI OS - Joint architecture with NVIDIA

keyMetrics.name: P/E (TTM)
keyMetrics.interpretation: Extremely high valuation. Peak AI premium reflected

keyMetrics.name: Forward P/E
keyMetrics.interpretation: FY2026 EPS $1.34 expected. Still highest in sector

keyMetrics.name: RSI
keyMetrics.interpretation: Neutral zone. MACD turning bullish signals potential bounce

growthDrivers.title: Palantir President Aki Jain Speaking at GTC 2026 Today
growthDrivers.description: NVIDIA Blog (3/16): Palantir president speaking at GTC accelerated computing session alongside Cadence CEO, IBM, and Morgan Stanley. Specific vision for Sovereign AI OS + NVIDIA partnership to be revealed.

growthDrivers.title: NVIDIA Joint Sovereign AI OS Launch, $600B Market
growthDrivers.description: Motley Fool (3/12): Palantir and NVIDIA jointly launched turnkey sovereign AI data center architecture. Enables governments worldwide to build and operate AI on their own infrastructure. $600B market opportunity.

growthDrivers.title: AIPCon 9 Mission-Critical Partnerships Announced
growthDrivers.description: Yahoo Finance (3/13): GE Aerospace (military aviation maintenance), Centrus Energy (nuclear AI), Ondas (drone ISR), World View (stratospheric ISR), LG CNS among multi-year contract signings.

growthDrivers.title: FY2026 Guidance $7.18-7.20B (+61%), Record Growth Outlook
growthDrivers.description: Guidance significantly exceeds prior consensus. AIP bootcamp strategy accelerating commercial revenue conversion.

competitiveAdvantage.summary: 20+ years in government and defense AI. Security clearances create insurmountable entry barriers. NVIDIA sovereign AI partnership expands global government market. Ontology platform is a unique moat.

moats.description: Top-level US DoD and intelligence clearances. Competitors cannot replicate.
Turnkey sovereign data center architecture. President speaking at GTC signals strategic depth.
5-day intensive pilots converting to enterprise-wide deals. High conversion rates.

competitors.name: Microsoft (Azure AI)
competitors.detail: Cloud AI platform. General approach vs Palantir's specialized analytics

competitors.name: Snowflake
competitors.detail: Data lakehouse. Expanding into analytics platform territory

competitors.name: C3.ai
competitors.detail: Enterprise AI. Lags Palantir in scale and track record

recentNews.headline: Palantir President Aki Jain speaking at NVIDIA GTC 2026 today on accelerated computing
recentNews.significance: Direct presentation at NVIDIA's flagship event. Signals strategic importance of sovereign AI partnership. Expands defense and enterprise AI market reach

recentNews.headline: BNP Paribas increases Palantir holdings by 17.6%. Institutional buying continues
recentNews.significance: BNP Paribas expanded to 48,512 shares. Multiple institutions added in Q3. Long-term growth conviction

recentNews.headline: NVIDIA-Palantir joint Sovereign AI OS and turnkey data center architecture launch
recentNews.significance: $600B sovereign AI market. Turnkey solution for governments to run AI on own infrastructure

recentNews.headline: Iran's IRGC designates Palantir as potential military technology target
recentNews.significance: Highlights influence as defense AI leader. Simultaneously raises geopolitical risk profile

recentNews.headline: LG CNS strategic partnership expansion, driving LG Group-wide AI transformation
recentNews.significance: From 2025 pilot to full LG Group rollout. Manufacturing, energy, electronics, logistics AI applications. Asia market acceleration

analystOpinions.notableComment: 16 of 28 analysts rate Buy. Consensus $200.41 (+33%). Rosenblatt $200 Strong Buy, UBS $180 Buy. GTC sovereign AI details could drive further upgrades.

risks.title: Death Cross Formed, Technical Bearish Signal
risks.description: 50-day SMA ($153.85) crossed below 200-day ($162.81). Similar pattern in Oct 2021 preceded -60% decline. Near-term further downside possible.

risks.title: Extreme Valuation at P/E 241x, P/S 81x
risks.description: $4.48B revenue company at $361B market cap. Growth deceleration would trigger sharp multiple compression.

risks.title: Iran IRGC Target Designation, Geopolitical Risk
risks.description: Iran's Revolutionary Guard designated Palantir as a potential military technology target. Double-edged sword of defense AI leadership.

risks.title: Share Dilution at +4.67% YoY
risks.description: Stock-based compensation driving ~5% annual dilution. Long-term shareholder value erosion.

risks.title: Big Tech AI Platform Competition
risks.description: Microsoft, Google, Amazon intensifying enterprise AI offerings. Commercial revenue growth slowdown risk.

buyReasons.title: President Speaking at GTC Today, NVIDIA Partnership Deepening
buyReasons.rationale: C-suite speaking at NVIDIA's flagship event signals strategic partnership depth. Sovereign AI $600B market acceleration.

buyReasons.title: FY2026 Guidance $7.2B (+61%), Record Growth Rate
buyReasons.rationale: Guidance significantly above prior consensus. AIP bootcamp strategy driving commercial conversion acceleration.

buyReasons.title: Institutional Buying Expanding
buyReasons.rationale: BNP Paribas +17.6% and multiple institutions adding. Betting on long-term growth despite valuation.

buyReasons.title: 47% FCF Margin + Debt-Free Balance Sheet
buyReasons.rationale: $7.18B cash, $229M debt. 47% FCF margin funds organic growth without external financing.

overallOpinion: Palantir President Aki Jain speaks at NVIDIA GTC today. The joint Sovereign AI OS opens a $600B government AI market, and today's presentation will reveal the specific roadmap.

Institutional investors are buying despite Iran risk and the death cross. BNP Paribas added 17.6%, and the LG CNS partnership is expanding into Asia. FY2026 guidance of $7.2B (+61%) is the highest growth rate ever.

At $150.95, below both the 50-day ($154) and 200-day ($163) with a death cross formed, but MACD is turning bullish. Analyst average target $200 (+33%). Today's GTC speech could be the catalyst for a near-term rebound.

investmentVerdict.summary: Today's GTC speech and sovereign AI $600B market entry strengthen the growth narrative. FY2026 +61% guidance and institutional buying are encouraging. Death cross and P/E 241x warrant dollar-cost averaging rather than lump-sum entry.

witty.hook: Iran wants to target Palantir, NVIDIA gave them the GTC stage
witty.text:
$PLTR (3/16) $150.95 (-1.66%)

Iran's Revolutionary Guard said 'Palantir is a target.' NVIDIA said 'here's the biggest AI stage in the world.' When your enemies acknowledge you, that's a different kind of validation.

BNP Paribas added 17.6% during the death cross panic. LG CNS partnership brings Korea into play. P/E 241x plus +61% growth: expensive or just getting started?

Target $200 (+33%). If the GTC speech delivers, the death cross becomes a footnote.

empathy.hook: PLTR holders, today's GTC deserves your attention
empathy.text:
$PLTR (3/16) $150.95 (-1.66%)

Death cross, Iran target, P/E 241x. If you hold PLTR, this hasn't been easy.

But today Palantir's president speaks at NVIDIA GTC. The sovereign AI $600B market vision gets specific. Institutions are unfazed, adding shares (BNP Paribas +17.6%).

FY2026 guidance $7.2B (+61%) is genuinely impressive. Target $200 (+33%). If you're worried, dollar-cost average. Today's GTC could be the inflection point.
